---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a repository, skill, or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?
你想解决什么问题？

## Proposed Change

Describe the change you want.
请描述你希望的改动。

## Why It Helps

Explain the expected value.
请说明它带来的预期价值。

## Scope And Risks

Call out any licensing, provenance, or maintenance concerns.
请指出任何许可、来源或维护方面的风险。
